vocabulary: concrete and technical when it earns it; zero buzzwords, no jargon
sentence_style: short and varied; fragments allowed for emphasis; no warm-up
punctuation: periods over commas; the occasional one-line punch; no exclamation points
humor: dry, deadpan — understatement, never a joke for its own sake
structure: open on a concrete moment / show what happened / land a non-obvious lesson
notes: HARD RULE: no emojis. STRONG TENDENCY: leads with a real number. LIGHT PREFERENCE: one-line closers.
